sheets.name: Defects
rawRows: Prod Regression | Resume Pending Order from POS trying to send OTP for a wrong number and getting 500 response
"Resume Pending Order" Functionality not working , TC is not mapped as its not part of core regression suite
NSQA-PROD | Singleview should prompt Maplewave to capture the customer’s name mandatorily during the FTTH activation flow, where the customer’s name is not already captured.
Customer Name saved as “Mobily Contract” for all New FTTH Customers if previous profile not exists in SV impacting  e-contract and communications
NSQA-PROD|FTTH-L54A|MW-RELOCATION|Nokia FlowOne request failed for Relocation Orders due to account Prefix "PR"
NSQA-PRD|TAFEELY FTTH POSTPAID| "WFM Acknowledgement Failure" Task created in TelFlow for Order ORD000000000747
PROD | Regression | Unable to do Quick login from Android MAPP
PROD | Regression |  Alternative Contact Number is not visible in POS
Prod | Regression | Unable to view or download Receipts from CC documents
NSQA-PROD|MW-POS| Addon Entitlement is not appearing in MW "Flex Min Intl & Local"
PROD | Regression | Port In Order Status is showing Cancelled in CC, even after order submitted successful from POS
QA in Prod| 5G at Home Unlimited getting No items in cart hence unable to click on Tender
PROD | Regression | "Generate Document to POS_AGENT" Action status is Assigned where it is expected to be Complete Postpaid to RAQI package change
Prod | Regression | Getting Error while trying to perform Device cashback purchase from POS
PROD | Regression | Post2Pre conversion form CC Getting error for OTP Verification
PROD | Regression | COO(along with sim swap & plan change to prepaid) order is stuck in validated status
Prod | Regression | Facing eligibility error while purchasing the Postpaid ESIM 50 in MW
Preprod|Regression| Device Instalment order stuck at checkout page after entering all details click continue not moving next page
NSQA-PROD | DIGITAL DEVICE | Anonymous Device Order on Cash is Routed to SIEBEL
Defect will be fixed as part of Device Task force
NSQA-PROD|DIGITAL DEVICE|Device Installment from Digital is failing due to incorrect contact number sent to SANAD/NAFITH.
PROD | Regression | Retention offers not visible while doing downgrade
Prod | FTTH Verification | FTTH Activation Order not reaching to Telflow , Getting "Failed to receive message from fabric" when querying the orders
